user.title: Party Dispenser
user.description: Connect Home Assistant to your Party Dispenser backend.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the backend.
error.invalid_response: The backend returned an unexpected response.

init.title: Party Dispenser options
init.description: Rotate the API token or change polling behaviour. Host and port cannot be changed here — remove and re-add the integration if they have changed.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the backend.

order_recipe.name: Order recipe
order_recipe.description: Place an order on the dispenser from an existing recipe.

recipe_id.name: Recipe ID
recipe_id.description: The UUID of the recipe to order.

session_uid.name: Session UID
session_uid.description: Identifier stored on the order — defaults to "home-assistant".

cancel_order.name: Cancel order
cancel_order.description: Cancel a queued or in-progress order.

order_id.name: Order ID
order_id.description: The UUID of the order to cancel.

session_uid.name: Session UID
session_uid.description: Must match the session UID the order was placed with — defaults to "home-assistant".

refresh.name: Refresh
refresh.description: Force an immediate refresh of the Party Dispenser state (sensors).
